stemHtml: Which statement is true if you compare raw data with computed data?

options.a: Sensor-based data is often referred to raw data. PBN is mainly based on such data.
options.b: Conventional radio navigation is based on raw data like information from navigation aids and measured air data.
options.c: PBN is based on computed data which is highly sensor-specific.
options.d: Raw data are based on computed data.
